title: Clipper Butane Gas 12 pcs Canister 300ml - Universal Refill for Lighters, BBQ, Cooking - Reliable & Safe Fuel Bottles Bulk
features: UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY: Features a universal valve design suitable for refilling various types of lighters and portable gas appliances
CAPACITY: Each canister contains 300ml of premium butane gas with bonus 50ml free, providing extended usage time
MULTIPACK OPTIONS: Available in convenient 6-pack or 12-pack configurations for bulk purchasing and long-term storage
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: High-quality butane formula ensures consistent gas flow and reliable ignition for various applications
VERSATILE USAGE: Suitable for multiple applications including lighter refills, portable cooking equipment, and outdoor heating devices
description: Experience reliable and efficient refuelling with Clipper's Universal Butane Gas canisters. Each 300ml canister features a universal valve design, making it compatible with a wide range of devices including standard lighters and portable cooking equipment. The generous 300ml capacity ensures long-lasting use, while the robust metal construction provides safe storage of the butane fuel. These professional-grade refill canisters come with an additional 50ml bonus content, offering excellent value for money. Perfect for outdoor cooking enthusiasts and those seeking a dependable fuel source for their portable devices. The standardised universal valve system ensures smooth and precise refilling operations. Available in convenient multi-pack options of 6 or 12 canisters, these fuel bottles are ideal for both regular users and bulk buyers. Each canister is manufactured to strict quality standards, providing consistent performance every time.
